OPTIONS:

result.stdout:
No Azure DevOps defaults are configured.
DESCRIPTION:
Lists all Azure DevOps projects in the organization

USAGE:
    azdo-scanner.dll list-projects [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                          Prints help information                 
        --include-serviceconnections    Include a list of service connections   
                                        for each project                        
        --projects <PROJECTS>           Comma-separated list of project names to
                                        include (optional). If not set, all     
                                        projects are included                   
        --org <ORG>                     The Azure DevOps organization URL. If   
                                        not provided, uses the default          
        --include-repos                 Include a list of repos for each project
